content: Salesforce LogAI: open-source log analytics library. Capabilities: log summarization (group raw logs by pattern/attributes), log clustering, anomaly detection (time-series via ETS on log counter vectors; semantic via one-class SVM on semantic vectors; deep learning CNN/LSTM/Transformer). Uses OpenTelemetry data model for platform compatibility; unified model interface; ships a GUI portal. Library/toolkit, not an end-user triage CLI — no hypothesis generation or citation mechanism.
